extracurriculars.title: Webaphors Channel Initiative
extracurriculars.description: Founded and developed the Webaphors channel initiative — educational content that bridges complex technical concepts with accessible metaphors and visual storytelling.
responsibilities: Develop creative content strategy for technical education
Create visual metaphors for complex programming concepts
Build audience engagement through innovative storytelling

extracurriculars.title: YouTube Shorts & Discord Learning Community
extracurriculars.description: Produce educational YouTube Shorts and moderate a Discord learning community focused on AI, cybersecurity, and emerging technology.
responsibilities: Research and script content on emerging technologies

extracurriculars.title: Math Tutor (Calculus / Statistics)
extracurriculars.description: One-on-one and group tutoring for undergraduate calculus and statistics students.
responsibilities: Tutor in calculus, statistics, and related mathematics
Create practice problems and study materials

extracurriculars.title: Cybersecurity Bootcamp Mentor
extracurriculars.description: Mentor students and assist faculty in cybersecurity bootcamps — knowledge assessments, career guidance, and practical skill development.
responsibilities: Mentor students in cybersecurity fundamentals and advanced topics
Assist faculty in assessment and curriculum development
Provide career guidance and industry insights
